note: accept: ALiBi is the most scale-validated locality-prior (BLOOM-176B); locality-prior family already wins at this tier (009-FIRE, 154-rebased-attn, 023-canon-conv, 143-shortconv); per-head linear-distance bias is structurally distinct from the closed free-scalar per-head levers (152, 155, 160, 166) — position-distance structure gives the optimizer a non-trivial axis those lack; mechanism already wired in models/layers.py (init line 1776-1778, apply line 2957-2960), only ~10 LoC of config wiring needed; transfer-risk low; clean informative A/B either way
